final_answer_preview:
Thanks for the go-ahead. I ran into a conflict:

- A channel named Match Highlights already exists in this Soccer scope (ID: 438d6za7je70nzcnpx8qp87e4t).
- The system couldn’t create a new one with that same name.

What would you like to do?
- Reuse the existing Match Highlights channel as-is (no name change). I can then set its description to your preferred text and adjust tabs/visibility as need
